category_sources: source_facts.description says it provides LLMs for the CLI; official README describes generating candidate shell commands from plain-English tasks.
display_name_sources: Official gorilla-llm/gorilla-cli repository README uses the display name Gorilla CLI.

repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Gorilla repository links to gorilla-llm/gorilla-cli, and that repository describes the packaged CLI.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says LLMs for your CLI; official README lists shell, terminal, LLM, and CLI-oriented usage.
